The [[Ghtroc Industries/Legends|Ghtroc Industries]] '''''Cargo Empress''-class super freighter''' was a 110-meter long ship which carried 50,000 metric tons of cargo. It operated with a crew of four and could carry up to eight passengers. Its defenses relied entirely on weak [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]], as the ship was completely unarmed and had a weak [[Hull/Legends|hull]].

==History==
The ''Cargo Empress'' was produced shortly after the introduction of the [[720 light freighter/Legends|Class 720 freighter]] and was an attempt to capitalize on the smaller ship's modest success. However, the ''Cargo Empress'' sold poorly and was a major contributing factor to Ghtroc's bankruptcy. In a desperate attempt to pay off the company's debts, all remaining ''Cargo Empress''-class ships were dumped on the market at very low prices. As a result, ships of the class could be found throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], despite their commercial failure.<ref name="PP" />
